---
title: "methods"
author: "yayin"
date: "2026-03-25"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(lubridate)
library(tidyr)
library(factoextra)
library(lubridate)
library(GGally)
library(ggplot2)
library(stringr)
```

### Load data: 
```{r loadingdata, include=FALSE}
#read data
asthma_precip_pm25_clean <- read_csv("asthma_precip_pm25_clean.csv")
pollen_count_latest_update <- read_csv("pollen count.csv")
```

### Cleaning and joining dataset: 
```{r data cleaning}

# aggregate the asthma precip pm25 dataset to be citywide
asthma_daily <- asthma_precip_pm25_clean %>%
  group_by(date) %>%
  summarise(
    avg_ppt = mean(ppt, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_pm25 = mean(pm25, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_asthma_er = sum(asthma_er_count, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# conver pollendatasest from wide to long
df_long <- pollen_count_latest_update %>%
  t() %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  
  # create date column from original column names
  mutate(date_raw = colnames(pollen_count_latest_update)) %>%
  
  # rename the only data column
  rename(value = V1) %>%
  
  # extract dates/clean things up
  mutate(
    date = stringr::str_extract(date_raw, "\\d{1,2}/\\d{1,2}/\\d{2}"),
    date = as.Date(date, "%m/%d/%y"),
    value = na_if(value, "–"),
    count = as.numeric(stringr::str_extract(value, "\\d+"))
  ) %>%
  select(date, count)

# Joining the dataset
asthma_daily <- asthma_daily %>%
  mutate(date = as.Date(date))

df_long <- df_long %>%
  mutate(date = as.Date(date))

final_dataset <- asthma_daily %>%
  left_join(df_long, by = "date")

final_dataset <- final_dataset %>%
  rename("pollen" = "count")

#export joint pollen dataset
write_csv(final_dataset, "final_dataset.csv")
```


## Remove missing rows

```{r}
final_dataset <- final_dataset %>%
  filter(complete.cases(.))
```

## Create constituent matrix

```{r}
Constituents0 <- final_dataset %>%
  select(-date, -total_asthma_er)

dim(Constituents0)
summary(Constituents0)
```

## Correlation structure

```{r}
ggcorr(Constituents0)
```

# Principal Components Analysis

```{r}
pca.constituent <- prcomp(Constituents0, scale. = TRUE)

summary(pca.constituent)
```

## Eigenvalues

```{r}
eigenvalues.v <- pca.constituent$sdev^2

perc_variance.v <- eigenvalues.v/sum(eigenvalues.v)
perc_variance.v <- round(100*perc_variance.v,1)

cumulative_perc_var.v <- cumsum(perc_variance.v)

eigenvalues.constituent <- data.frame(
  PC = seq_along(eigenvalues.v),
  Eigenvalue = eigenvalues.v,
  Variance = perc_variance.v,
  Cumulative = cumulative_perc_var.v
)

eigenvalues.constituent
```

## Scree plot

```{r}
fviz_eig(pca.constituent)
```

## PCA Loadings

```{r}
loadings.constituent <- as.data.frame.matrix(pca.constituent$rotation)
loadings.constituent$Constituent <- rownames(loadings.constituent)

loadings.long <- loadings.constituent %>%
  pivot_longer(-Constituent, names_to="PC", values_to="Loading")

loadings.long %>%
  filter(PC %in% c("PC1","PC2", "PC3")) %>%
  ggplot(aes(Constituent, Loading)) +
  geom_col() +
  facet_wrap(~PC) +
  theme_bw()
```

## PCA Scores

```{r}
scores.constituent <- as.data.frame(pca.constituent$x)

scores.constituent <- scores.constituent %>%
  select(PC1:PC3)

scores.constituent$Date <- final_dataset$date

head(scores.constituent)
```
